name: sschart
description: In-house canvas trading-chart engine with a lightweight-charts-shaped API (window.LightweightCharts).

scripts.test: npm run typecheck:core && npm run api:check && node build-tests.mjs && node --test "tests/_dist/**/*.test.cjs"
scripts.test:browser: npm run build && npm run build:browser-fixtures && playwright test
scripts.test:browser:update: npm run build && npm run build:browser-fixtures && playwright test --update-snapshots
scripts.test:performance: npm run build && npm run build:browser-fixtures && playwright test tests/browser/chart.performance.spec.ts tests/browser/orderflow.performance.spec.ts --project=chromium-dpr1
